title: telemetry-otel — compliance evidence
description: Telemetry data leaves the application to third-party collectors (or self-hosted). Compliance surface centres on data minimisation before export + subprocessor management.

controls.evidence: SpanAttributeRedactor pipeline strips PII from span attributes before export. Redacted keys config'd in telemetry-otel.redact.*. Common redactions: email, phone, IP (in prod), Authorization header, cookies.
Third-party backends (DataDog, Grafana Cloud, Honeycomb) are subprocessors. See subprocessors.json. Self-hosted collectors are not subprocessors.
Span attributes include academorix.workspace_id + academorix.workspace_id — count as processing records. Documented per subprocessor.
OTLP transport is TLS 1.2+. Optional bearer-token auth via OTEL_EXPORTER_OTLP_HEADERS. Never carries CVV / PAN / passwords (redacted).
OTLP endpoint credentials rotated quarterly. Stored as secrets, not in code.
Health probes on the pipeline itself — dropped-spans-ratio + exporter-reachable feed alerting.
